docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,250.00 FILED BY MELVIN BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER PAT DBA COFFEE CONFUSION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED LETTER TO PAT BUTLER RETURNED FOR INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BUTLER PAT DBA COFFEE CONFUSION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELVIN BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUTLER PAT DBA COFFEE CONFUSION $700.00 PRINCIPAL, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $713.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BUTLER PAT DBA COFFEE CONFUSION HEARING SET FOR JUL-02-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-02-1992, GRANTED
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELVIN BRIAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BUTLER PAT DBA COFFEE CONFUSION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
